CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation & Notice Of Hearing (W/First Appearance Fee)
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vivian Lerche telephone number 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff FIA Card Services.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tenative ruling. PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES' Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation is granted. No opposition filed. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
